description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 2 hrs 53 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 57 mins. His most-used languages were Java, Bash, and Markdown. The activity data does not list any repository names, opened PRs, or new repositories for the week.
